cards.name: Amex Gold

categories.name: Flights (direct or AmexTravel)
categories.note: Book direct with airline or amextravel.com

protections: Extended warranty: +1 year on warranties up to 5 years
Trip delay insurance: up to $300 after 12+ hour delay
Global Assist Hotline (24/7, when 100+ mi from home)
Amex Presale & Reserved Tickets: early access to concerts, sports, events (americanexpress.com/experiences)
No return protection, no trip cancellation

cards.name: Amazon Prime Visa
cards.membershipNote: Requires Prime ($139/yr) — you already pay this

categories.name: Amazon.com / Fresh / Whole Foods / Chase Travel
categories.note: Requires active Prime. Drops to 3% if Prime cancelled

categories.name: Prime Card Bonus (rotating)
categories.note: Random limited-time offers (e.g. 10% on select Amazon categories, Prime Day bonuses). No fixed schedule — check Chase app or Amazon checkout for active deals.

protections: Extended warranty: +1 year on warranties up to 3 years
Baggage delay insurance: up to $100/day for 3 days
Visa Signature Luxury Hotel Collection (900+ hotels, room upgrades, best rate)
No blackout dates on Chase Travel redemptions

cards.name: Robinhood Gold Card
cards.membershipNote: Requires Gold ($50/yr) — you already pay this

categories.name: Everything
categories.note: Flat rate, no caps, no categories to track

cards.name: United Explorer

categories.name: United Flights (pay w/ card)
categories.note: Currently 2x. April 2, 2026: jumps to 9x (6x holding + 3x paying)

protections: Free first checked bag — up to $160/roundtrip (you + companion on same reservation)
25% back on United inflight + Club premium drink purchases
Basic Economy: MUST hold card to earn ANY miles (as of April 2)

cards.name: Chase Freedom (Legacy)

categories.name: Quarterly 5% Categories
categories.note: Up to $1,500/quarter, must activate. Visa card (not Mastercard like Flex)

categories.name: Lyft Rides
categories.note: Extra 1% on top of base 1%. Expires Sept 30, 2027 — not permanent

categories.name: Everything Else
categories.note: No fixed 3% dining or 5% Chase Travel like Flex has. NEVER cancel — oldest account

protections: No blackout dates on Chase Travel
No longer open to new applicants (closed Sept 2020)

credits.name: Dining Credit
credits.note: ONLY at: Grubhub, Cheesecake Factory, Goldbelly, Wine.com, Five Guys. (Shake Shack & Milk Bar removed Sept 2024.) Enrollment required.
credits.setup:
1. Open Amex app > Benefits
2. Find '$120 Dining Credit' and tap Enroll
3. Use your Amex Gold at any of: Grubhub, Cheesecake Factory, Goldbelly, Wine.com, Five Guys
4. Up to $10 statement credit per month
5. Does NOT work at other restaurants — only these 5 merchants

credits.name: Uber Cash
credits.note: Rides or Uber Eats in U.S. Does NOT roll over. Add Gold Card to Uber account to activate.
credits.enrollAction: Add Amex Gold card in Uber app > Wallet > Add payment
credits.setup:
1. Download Uber app (if needed)
2. Open Uber > Account > Wallet > Add payment
3. Add your Amex Gold card
4. $10 Uber Cash loads automatically each month
5. Use on rides or Uber Eats orders
6. Does NOT roll over — use each month or lose it
7. No subscription needed — just a free Uber account

credits.name: Resy Credit
credits.note: Dine at any U.S. Resy restaurant or eligible Resy purchases. $50 Jan-Jun, $50 Jul-Dec. Enrollment required.
credits.setup:
1. Open Amex app > Benefits > Resy Credit > Enroll
2. Go to resy.com or Resy app to find restaurants near you
3. Dine at any U.S. Resy restaurant and pay with Amex Gold
4. $50 statement credit per half-year (Jan-Jun, Jul-Dec)
5. No reservation required — just pay with your Gold card
6. No subscription needed — just a free Resy account

credits.name: Dunkin' Credit
credits.note: New benefit (added with $325 fee increase). Enrollment required via Amex offers.
credits.enrollAction: Enroll at amex.com/offers or Amex app > Benefits > Dunkin'
credits.setup:
1. Open Amex app > Benefits > Dunkin' Credit > Enroll
2. Visit any U.S. Dunkin' location
3. Pay with your Amex Gold card
4. Up to $7 statement credit per month
5. No subscription needed

credits.name: Hotel Collection Credit
credits.note: $100 experience credit on 2+ night stays at Hotel Collection properties (curated luxury hotels via AmexTravel). Plus room upgrade, early check-in/late check-out.

credits.name: Instacart+ Credit
credits.note: Any Instacart order. Also includes 3mo free Instacart+ then 25% off annual. Expires 12/31/27.
credits.enrollAction: Link United Explorer in Instacart app > Payment methods
credits.setup:
1. Download Instacart app
2. Create a free account (no paid subscription needed)
3. Go to Account > Payment methods > Add card
4. Add your United Explorer card
5. Order $10+ of groceries from any store (King Soopers, Costco, etc.)
6. $10 statement credit appears on your Chase bill
7. Repeat monthly — $120/yr in free groceries
8. Optional: Accept free 3-month Instacart+ for waived delivery fees

credits.name: Rideshare Credit
credits.note: $5/mo statement credit on rideshare (Uber, Lyft, etc). Yearly opt-in required — re-enroll each January.

credits.name: United Club Passes
credits.note: 2 passes per anniversary year. Non-transferable — cardholder must be present with guest.

credits.name: JSX Flight Credit
credits.note: $100/yr for JSX semi-private flights. JSX = small jets, private terminals, no TSA. Select cities (West Coast, Vegas, Dallas). Unusable if you don't fly JSX.

credits.name: United Hotels Credit
credits.note: $50 credit on each of first 2 prepaid hotel stays per anniversary year via United Hotels.

credits.name: Avis/Budget Rental Credit
credits.note: $25 TravelBank cash on each of first 2 Avis/Budget rentals per year. After credit used, Robinhood 3% beats United 2x.

credits.name: TravelBank Bonus ($10K spend)
credits.note: $100 United TravelBank cash after $10K spend in a calendar year. Only usable on United/United Express flights. NOT worth chasing — moving bills to Robinhood Gold 3% saves more than this $100 bonus.

credits.name: DashPass Membership (6mo free)
credits.note: 6 months free DashPass ($9.99/mo = $60 value). $0 delivery fees + lower service fees on DoorDash/Caviar. WARNING: Auto-charges $9.99/mo after 6 months — cancel before month 7! Through 12/31/27.
credits.enrollAction: Download DoorDash app > Add Freedom card as default payment > Accept DashPass prompt
credits.setup:
1. Download DoorDash app
2. Create a free account (no paid subscription needed upfront)
3. Go to Account > Payment > Add card
4. Add your Chase Freedom card as DEFAULT payment
5. DoorDash will prompt you to activate free DashPass — accept it
6. You get 6 months of free DashPass ($0 delivery fees)
7. WARNING: After 6 months you'll be charged $9.99/mo automatically
8. Set a reminder to cancel DashPass before month 7!

credits.name: DoorDash Non-Restaurant Promo
credits.note: $10 off grocery/retail/convenience DoorDash orders each quarter. Requires active DashPass. Apply promo at checkout. Does NOT roll over — use it or lose it. Through 12/31/27.
credits.enrollAction: Activate DashPass first, then apply promo code at DoorDash checkout on non-restaurant orders
credits.setup:
1. Must have active DashPass (see above)
2. Open DoorDash > browse non-restaurant stores (grocery, convenience, retail)
3. Add items to cart
4. At checkout, apply the $10 promo code
5. Up to $10 off per quarter
6. Does NOT roll over — use it each quarter or lose it
7. Works through 12/31/27

credits.name: Global Entry/TSA Pre
credits.note: $120 credit every 4 years (~$30/yr). Charge Global Entry ($120) or TSA Pre ($78) to Explorer card for auto reimbursement.

reminders.title: Check new United Explorer offer
reminders.note: The United card refresh goes live today. Check the new welcome bonus — may be higher than 70K+10K. Visit chase.com/united

reminders.title: Cancel United Explorer card
reminders.note: Cancel BEFORE Sept 1 to avoid $150 annual fee. Call Chase: 800-432-3117. Miles stay safe in MileagePlus. Wait 30 days then reapply for new bonus.

reminders.title: Reapply for United Explorer
reminders.note: 30 days since cancellation. Apply for new United Explorer at chase.com/united. You're eligible for the full welcome bonus (48+ months since last bonus). First year $0 fee. Hit $3K spend in 3 months.

reminders.title: Switch online bills to Robinhood Gold (use virtual card now)
reminders.note: GEICO auto ($188/mo) | Claude AI ($200/mo) | Walmart.com (if any purchases) | OpenAI ($20/mo) | DISH TV ($24/mo) | Sling TV ($5/mo) | Apple.com ($30/mo) | Boost Mobile ($13/mo) | Water bill ($90/mo) | Assurant/homeowners ($2,650/yr) | TurboTax | Daily Wire | Gorilla Mind — all earning 1% on wrong cards, should be 3% on Robinhood

reminders.title: Switch in-store payments when physical Robinhood card arrives
reminders.note: Sam's Club ($247/mo) | Shell gas ($40/mo) | Target ($37/mo) | Home Depot | Nordstrom — use Apple Wallet tap-to-pay or physical card

reminders.title: Switch to Amex Gold for dining/groceries
reminders.note: King Soopers → Amex Gold (4x, currently on Amazon at 1%) | Parry's, TopGolf, Davidsons, all restaurants → already on Amex Gold (correct)

tips: Spin before a restaurant dinner or big grocery run
If you land 24-hour boost, have purchases queued up
30-day 5% jackpot = put EVERYTHING on Gold Card
Timed prizes stack sequentially, not combined
1-2 spins per month is the sweet spot
